description: Screen-reader smoke run over the classroom mic → chat → whiteboard transitions. Mounts <mc-classroom> at lg layout (avatar | whiteboard | transcript), steps the virtual screen reader through the three regions in PT-BR, toggles the mic (idle → armed), posts a student turn, submits the exercise, and asserts the required PT phrases appear in order.
requiredPhrases: Bem-vindo de volta. Vamos aquecer com frases sobre ontem.
Você disse Eu fui ao parque ontem.
